com.intrasoft.icarus.revenuemanagement.taxpayeraccounting.rest.dto.bill.BillSegment
: 
{type: "object",…}
description
: 
"### Validations:\n- __billSegmentId__ should be unique(autogenerated value)\n- __parentBillSegment.id__ should be valid if it is filled in\n- __billSegmentTypeCd__ should be a valid one for the specific bill’s type\n- __billSegmentTypeCd__ should be active\n- __billSegmentId__, __billId__ , __created_dt__ cannot be updated\n- __created_dt__ is set upon creation with the current date\n- __billSegmentStatusCL__ is set to PENDING upon creation and cannot be changed through this API\n- __obligationAction.id__ is should be valid\n- __obligationAction.id__ should relate to a revenue type which is a valid one for specific bill segment type\n- __obligationAction.id__ should relate to a revenue type on which the party role has non canceled registration\n- __billSegments__ cannot be added if bill status is completed or canceled\n- __billSegments__ cannot be removed through this API\n- __billSegments__ may exist until max 3 levels tree depth\n- __billSegments__ tree depth must be included by unique bill segment ids\n- parent-child in __billSegments__ should be linked to the same __obligationAction.id__\n- __overrideConversionDtSw__ if enabled then __currencyConversionDt__ should be provided\n- __overrideAccountingDtSw__ if enabled then __accountingDt__ should be provided\n- __overrideEffectiveDtSw__ if enabled then __effectiveDt__ should be provided\n- __overrideCancelAccountingDtSw__ if enabled then __cancelAccountingDt__ should be provided\n- __relatedBillSegment__ exists and is in status frozen\n- user cannot add waivers relationship manually\n- an amendment bill segment cannot have an amendment\n- __relatedBillSegment__ has the same currency with the initial bill segment\n- __relatedBillSegment__ has obligation action that matches the initial bill segment obligation action\n- bill segment can't have itself as __relatedBillSegment__\n- bill segment can't have its parent as __relatedBillSegment__ as well\n- __paymentHintId__ should be valid if it is filled in\n- __paymentHintId__ is applicable only on credit Bill Segment\n- __paymentHintId__ can be modified only in Pending or in Frozen status if related Bill Segment Type allows it\n- __paymentHintId__is not used in another Bill Segment or Payment Event (Payment Destination)\n"
properties
: 
{id: {type: "string"}, identificationLabel: {type: "string"},…}

: 
{type: "object",…}
description
: 
"### Validations:\n- __id__ is auto generated. It should be valid on update\n- __depositRegisterStatusCL__ upon successful creation should be set to 'OPEN'\n- __openedByUserCode__ should be equal to __createdByUserCode__ upon creation of deposit register\n- __openedTimestamp__ should be equal to __creationTimestamp__ upon creation of deposit register\n- __tenderDeposits__ section is optional\n- __balancingInfo__ section is systemic with the exception of the 'endingBalance' field in the DepositRegisterEndingBalance dto, which is set by user\n- __creationTimestamp__, __createdByUserCode__, __openedTimestamp__, __openedByUserCode__, __closedTimestamp__,\n __closedByUserCode__, __depositRegisterStatusCL__ and __balancingInfo__ fields should be systemic\n- __depositRegisterStatusCL__ 'CLOSED' cannot be updated\n- User can reopen a deposit register provided the __depositRegisterStatusCL__ is BALANCING or CLOSED\n- When __depositRegisterStatusCL__ is BALANCING, user should be able to add or update ending balance field\n- User cannot update the deposit register once __depositRegisterStatusCL__ is CLOSED\n- Only __allowedToUseUserCode__ can edit a deposit register or everyone in case no allowed user has been defined)\n"

com.intrasoft.icarus.revenuemanagement.taxpayeraccounting.rest.dto.liability.UnallocatedFT
: 
{type: "object",…}
description
: 
"We define as unallocated amount the subtraction from the FT amount the sum of all amounts of Allocation Links that have as credit the given id.\nEG: If a FT has an amount of 500, and there are 2 allocation links with this ft as credit,\n1 with amount 200 and another with 160,\nthe unallocated amount = 500 - (200 + 160) = 140.\nNote that the unallocated amount could very well be 0.\nFields sourceAmount & sourceUnallocatedAmount are filled only in source currency mode.\n"

com.intrasoft.icarus.revenuemanagement.taxpayeraccounting.rest.dto.payment.PaymentEvent
: 
{type: "object",…}
description
: 
"### Validations:\n- The payor (Party) exists\n- Edit a Payment Event only in __PENDING__ or __SUSPENDED__ status\n- The following fields are read-only and cannot be updated:\n   - Creation date time (__creationDateTime__)\n   - Payment Event status (__paymentEventStatusCL__)\n   - Cancel reason (__paymentEventCancelReasonCL__)\n   - Cancel comment (__paymentEventCancelComment__)\n   - Re-open reason (__paymentEventReOpenReasonCL__)\n   - Re-open comment (__paymentEventReOpenComment__)\n   - Payment Segments (__segments__)\n- Currency (__currencyCL__) and Translation Date (__translationDate__) can be modified only if all the following apply:\n   - There are no Segments in the existing Payment Event\n   - There are no Tenders in the existing Payment Event or there are no Tenders in the updated Payment Event or there are only new Tenders in the updated Payment Event\n- Payment Segments (__segments__) are read-only always\n- Translation Date should have a value only when secondary currency is selected\n- Tender Register should be allowed for the current user\n- Create/Edit/Delete a Payment Event is allowed only when the related Tender Register is in OPEN status (On Update both the existing and the new tender register, if changed, must be in OPEN status)\n- __currencyCL__ codelist item must be active (this can be found by the metadata with attribute key \"__inactive__\" of the given codelist item)\n- The liable party role if set, must be valid\n- The `paymentHintId` of a Payment Destination must be unique within the list of destinations in the Payment Event\n- The `paymentHintId` of a Payment Destination must not be in use by another Payment Destination or Bill Segment\n"

"For the given Liability Id, calculates it's balance taking into consideration only the Bill Segments provided along with the respective, also provided, percentage.\n\nAdditionally, to calculate each Bill Segment's Balance, uses only the provided links.
